commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the fallback id regression and related tests, but maintainer approval-safety review is still required afterward.; Needs attention: The diff changes a plugin-approval security boundary and still needs maintainer acceptance after the concrete fallback regression is fixed.; Review finding: [P2] Keep raw plugin approval fallback IDs actionable — src/infra/plugin-approvals.ts:3706 (sha=a127fcaea76ff73b50367dd98f3e69b2c2a2d75a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `approvals.plugin.language` config and SDK option for plain-language plugin approval prompts, wires it through forwarding plus Telegram/Matrix delivery, and adds renderer/channel/config/docs coverage.

PR surface: Source +3711, Tests +2783, Docs +10, Generated 0. Total +6504 across 41 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction: render default or `simple-technical` plugin approval text on the PR head and it emits `/approve <id>`, while the existing `/approve` parser treats that literal token as the approval id.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the fallback id regression and related tests, but maintainer approval-safety review is still required afterward.
